title: pureClaw Security Policy
description: Declarative security policy for pureClaw/Nexus agent framework

version.description: Monotonic policy version — must increase on each update

read_allow.description: Glob patterns for paths allowed for read operations

read_deny.description: Glob patterns for paths denied for read operations (takes precedence)

write_allow.description: Glob patterns for paths allowed for write operations

write_deny.description: Glob patterns for paths denied for write operations (takes precedence)

fetch_deny_domains.description: Domain globs denied for web_fetch (takes precedence)

block_private_ranges.description: Block requests to RFC 1918, loopback, and link-local addresses

allowed.description: Tool names allowed for execution. ['*'] = all.

denied.description: Tool names explicitly denied (takes precedence over allowed)

max_tokens_per_session.description: Maximum cumulative tokens per session (0 = unlimited)

system_prompt_immutable.description: Prevent tools from modifying the system prompt

redact_patterns.description: Regex patterns matching credential strings to redact

redact_env_vars.description: Environment variable names whose values should be redacted from output

enabled.description: Enable audit logging of all tool executions and LLM calls

log_tool_args.description: Log tool argument hashes (for forensics without leaking content)

log_result_preview.description: Log first 200 chars of tool results (redacted)

retention_days.description: Days to retain audit logs (0 = forever)
